title: My Products
description: A supplier's catalogue: the products you list for buyers to price and RFQ.

steps.title: Your catalogue
steps.description: Every product you have listed, with its price and status.
steps.voiceScript: This is your product catalogue: everything you have listed for buyers.
steps.captionText: This is your product catalogue: everything you have listed for buyers.
steps.fallbackMessage: Your catalogue: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Add a product
steps.description: Listed products appear in buyer searches and RFQs.
steps.voiceScript: Add a product. Listed products appear in buyer searches and RFQs.
steps.captionText: Add a product. Listed products appear in buyer searches and RFQs.
steps.fallbackMessage: Add a product: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Edit a listing
steps.description: Keep prices and specs current so buyers trust them.
steps.voiceScript: Edit a listing to keep its price and specs current.
steps.captionText: Edit a listing to keep its price and specs current.
steps.fallbackMessage: Edit a listing: not visible on this screen yet.
